description_long: This coffee machine features a modern, boxy design with a prominent rectangular body in a dark gray finish. The front panel includes a large, flat display or control area above a recessed tray, with a single dispensing spout and a cup platform below. On top, there are two brown-tinted, box-like containers, likely for coffee beans or grounds and water, both with smooth, flat lids. The left side of the machine is mostly featureless, while the right side and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the machine's robust, utilitarian build. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with a glossy and sleek surface finish. The overall appearance suggests a commercial-grade appliance suitable for urban public spaces or office environments.
description: A modern, boxy coffee machine with a dark gray body, brown-tinted top containers, and a prominent front control panel with a dispensing spout and tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main control panel, dispensing spout, cup tray, and two brown-tinted containers on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the machine and the stacked containers on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back and the larger top container.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the machine's profile, the protruding front tray, and the arrangement of the top containers.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A large, flat rectangular panel on the front, likely touch-sensitive, with a single button or icon below and a dispensing spout to the right.
